narrative:
Liverpool TWP township has 4,653 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
